title: Living Conditions of Social Assistance Recipients and Social Work 1987
description: The survey charted living conditions, experiences of life and client relationship of social assistance recipients and social work. Firstly, respondents were asked about previous contacts with social services office, previous occupation and job and length of and reason for unemployment. They were also asked to state different illnesses and ailments they had suffered from in the past twelve months.
